subcodes.first_line: O blessed Leaf! Though that luminous star hath set beneath the horizon of contingent being, yet from the dawning-place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مبارکه اگرچه آن کوکب نورانی از افق امکان افول نمود ولی از مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @firmness in the Covenant
